mission_rationale: Instruments the codex-fleet-death observation surface. Joshua's prior reports of clean-exit-to-bash with no crash trace had no forensic capture. This dispatch puts the launcher in place so the next death event is captured by design (exit_evidence-PID-TS.json). Serves continuous-orchestrator-uptime by transforming an unobservable failure class into a measurable one.
